note: Explains community solar subscriptions and bill-credit mechanics relevant to decentralized electricity access.

note: Federal overview of distributed energy resources and microgrids as resilience and solar integration tools.

note: Primary project page for an open-source energy management system used to coordinate renewables, storage, grid interaction, and loads.

title: HeishaMon
note: Open-source hardware and firmware project for local heat-pump telemetry and control through MQTT and home automation integrations.

title: Thermal Energy Network
note: Background source describing thermal energy networks as shared loops connecting buildings with heat pumps.
